nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Edward William Nelson
nodes.summary: Edward William Nelson是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Yellow rail、Sinaloa martin、Varied solitaire，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Pine–oak forest
nodes.summary: Pine–oak forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联32种鸟类，包括Mottled owl、白喉蓝头鹊、小蓝头鹊等32种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Sinaloa martin
nodes.summary: Sinaloa martin（Sinaloa martin，学名 Progne sinaloae），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Sinaloa martin (Progne sinaloae) is a Vulnerable species of bird in the family Hirundinidae, the swallows and martins. It breeds in Mexico; its wintering range is not known but is believed to be in South America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: https://www.museum.lsu.edu/~Remsen/SACCCountryLists.htm retrieved November 30, 2025 In Mexico the Sinaloa martin primarily inhabits pine and pine-oak forest in the subtropical and lower tropical zones

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The causes of the decline in this species are unknown." Some authors suggest that logging of Mexico's montane forest has contributed but hesitate to name that the only cause
